candidate_definition_hints.text: More accurate f, F, t, T navigation in Vim.

Characters that are reachable with a single jump are highlighted, while others are dimmed. This enhancement enhances the accuracy of navigation using `f`, `F`, `t`, and `T` commands. Moreover, you can prefix the command with a numerical `[count]` (e.g., `3f`), which will exclusi…
